title: Left Join
description: Retrieve all records from the left table and the matching records from the right table.
problemStatement:
Don't lose data! Retrieve all `products` and their associated `reviews` (if any). Select the product `name` and the `rating`.

**Requirement:** Use a `LEFT JOIN` so that products without reviews are still included in the result.
hints: A regular `INNER JOIN` would filter out products that haven't been reviewed yet.
expectedOutput: All products, with ratings where available
